title: pelargonium × pulcherrimum
intro: Pelargonium × pulcherrimum, commonly known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. It is a type of flowering plant known for its beautiful pink to purple flowers and fragrant leaves, often used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and flowers of Pelargonium × pulcherrimum have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia, due to their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, can be used to alleviate these health concerns.
